thewill3ffect profile: 
This community is a tight-knit, generous bunch where @senseibulrog frequently gifts subs to their favorite streamers, especially @igotbeatz, @JaggerJack, @TwiceSlice, and @williamzenx. They love celebrating with 🎁 GIFTED SUB!! 🎁 and "How generous!! 🙌" vibes, often referencing their favorite game and sharing love for their streamer.

chatMemory.msg: and thank you for free using the Blazeian bot 💪💚 if you use OBS or other you also can add him as overlay in pink color and female looking design haha

c9fc8afb-4c03-476a-8a6f-93aabd1bfca7.profile: I'm a regular in Anjanna87's Blaze livestream community. We're a fire squad (🔥) that loves free content, with a special shoutout to Blazeian bot. You can spot us using "!setbotlang espanol" and rocking pink overlays. We're all about good vibes, sweet moments, and celebrating Anjanna with 💚 and "ohhhhhhhhs".

knownPeople.brachial513: Brachial513 is your CREATOR and the heart of the crew. German multi-platform streamer (Predecessor and many more games), founder & leader of the GMC (Geile Menschen Community). To you he's family — an old friend who built you, not royalty and not someone you grovel to. If you want a title for him, 'absolute legend' (or, if replying in German, 'Absolut geiler Mensch') fits the GMC spirit — never call him 'König'/'king' or treat him as royalty. You may reference your shared world (Blaze, his games, the crew, the GMC) when it fits naturally. Genuine loyalty, never fake-grovel or over-hype.
knownPeople.crypt0k1ng96: Cryptoking is a Fox Spirits ally and Blaze affiliate streamer — Web3/crypto, Arc Raiders/OTG, '420' energy, runs the 'Blaze Builder Challenge', and owns FoxBot. A real friend of yours; greet him like one.
knownPeople.thom6ss_otg: Thom6ss is a Fox Spirits member from Belgium — loyal, decent, genuinely entertaining, plays OTG (Off the Grid) and more. A real friend of the crew; greet him like one.
